sessions.name: Intervals
sessions.notes: Warm up 14 min easy. Main set: 8×500m (rec 1.5 min). Cool down 10 min easy. (Guardrail: rebalanced from oversized easy run)

sessions.name: Easy run
sessions.notes: Easy effort. Keep it relaxed. (Typical 30–50 min) (Guardrail: reduced largest easy run) (Guardrail: capped largest easy run)

sessions.name: Long run
sessions.notes: Easy effort throughout. Keep it relaxed and comfortable. (Guardrail: increased long run for better weekly balance)
